summary: Iteration 8 testing complete. All new features verified: 1) Chat markdown rendering working correctly - bold text, bullet points, numbered lists render properly (no raw ** markers), 2) Chat system prompt upgraded with structured formatting, 3) 3D visualizations render (ProcessScene, IntegrationsGlobe, HeroScene), 4) Orchestration hub-spoke visual in Use Cases section, 5) Language switching DE/EN/NL works, 6) Mobile chat is full-screen. All 40 backend tests passed (28 admin + 12 chat/markdown). No regressions found.

critical_code_review_comments: ReactMarkdown + remark-gfm integration working correctly for chat messages
Chat markdown CSS (.chat-md) properly styles bold, lists, headings, code blocks
System prompt upgraded with clear formatting instructions (bold, bullets, numbered lists)
3D Canvas scenes use Suspense fallback for graceful loading

Language context properly resets chat messages on language change

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 verified all new features: 1) Chat markdown rendering with ReactMarkdown + remark-gfm - bold, bullets, numbered lists render correctly, 2) Upgraded system prompt with formatting instructions, 3) Premium 3D visualizations (ProcessScene with flow streams, IntegrationsGlobe with enhanced rings, HeroScene with neural network), 4) Orchestration hub-spoke visual in Use Cases, 5) Language switching DE/EN/NL, 6) Mobile chat full-screen. All admin features from iteration 7 still working. Cookie banner may block interactions - dismiss first.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live - Chat uses GPT-4o-mini via Emergent LLM key, Email via Resend
